headline: Studio Owner @ Amanda Webb Dance Instruction | ER RN (Per-Diem) at Laurel Creek Regional Medical Center
summary: Founder of Amanda Webb Dance Instruction at Rhythm Dance Studio, West Reading PA. Per-diem senior emergency nurse at Laurel Creek Regional Medical Center. Building toward a permanent studio home in the Berks area through a mix of teaching revenue, targeted grants, and a Studio Fund savings plan. Focus areas: adult contemporary and beginner ensemble instruction, ER trauma nursing, community arts programming.
